# Sandbox Feature Shadow Spec

> Sandbox Mode (What-If) - Multi-transaction budget planning scratchpad with live projected STS

**Status:** In Progress
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Problem Statement

Users need to plan multiple hypothetical financial moves before committing to them — for example, lining up rent, groceries, and a vacation after a salary hits, or checking whether a string of purchases is affordable before payday. The current implementation only supports a single ephemeral simulation that resets on leave. Without a persistent, multi-transaction sandbox, users cannot build and review a full spending plan, and have no way to compare that plan against their real Safe to Spend across sessions.

## Target User

Any active user who wants to plan ahead before spending. This covers two scenarios: the "big month planner" who wants to map out major expenses after income lands, and the "pre-payday checker" who wants to know whether a series of upcoming purchases is feasible before funds are available. Neither user is a financial expert — they want a scratchpad, not a spreadsheet.

## Success Metrics

- User can add multiple income and expense transactions to a named sandbox and see projected STS update immediately after each addition (reactive, no manual refresh)
- Comparison delta (sandbox STS vs real STS) is visible on the same screen, without navigating away
- Sandbox plan persists across app sessions until the user deletes it or it expires (30 days inactivity)
- Individual sandbox transactions can be promoted to real pending transactions one at a time
- Zero contamination between sandbox and real STS calculations at all times

## Out of Scope

- Bulk promote (converting all sandbox transactions to real in one action) — deferred
- Recurring sandbox transactions — deferred
- Sandbox calendar view (visualizing sandbox transactions on the calendar grid) — deferred
- Per-account balance breakdown inside sandbox — deferred
- Sandbox sharing or export — not planned

## Non-Functional Requirements

- **Performance:** Projected STS must recalculate and emit within 100ms of a sandbox transaction insert/delete. The reactive chain (DB write → Flow emission → UseCase → ViewModel → UI) must not block the main thread.
- **Reliability:** Sandbox transactions are fully persisted to SQLite — no data loss on app kill or backgrounding. Expiry (30 days inactivity) runs at app start only, never mid-session.
- **Correctness:** Sandbox STS calculation uses exactly the same formula as real STS (`initialSafeToSpend + sum(income amounts) - sum(expense amounts)` for sandbox transactions). No divergence between the two formulas.
- **Isolation:** `is_sandbox = 0` is always enforced on real STS queries. Sandbox transactions never appear in real balance calculations.
- **Accessibility:** The "Add Transaction" button meets the 44x44dp minimum touch target. Projected STS color (red when negative) is accompanied by a text label, not color alone.

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/sandbox/
// ├── data/
// │   ├── local/           # SandboxSnapshotsEntity, SandboxTransactionsEntity
// │   ├── repository/      # SandboxRepositoryImpl
// │   └── mapper/          # SandboxMapper
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # SandboxSnapshot, SandboxTransaction, SandboxComparison, AddSandboxTransactionRequest
// │   ├── repository/      # ISandboxRepository
// │   └── usecase/         # CreateSandboxUseCase, GetSandboxesUseCase, GetSandboxByIdUseCase,
// │                        #   AddSimulationTransactionUseCase, RemoveSimulationTransactionUseCase,
// │                        #   GetSandboxSafeToSpendUseCase, GetSandboxTransactionsUseCase,
// │                        #   CompareSandboxWithRealityUseCase, PromoteTransactionUseCase,
// │                        #   DeleteSandboxUseCase, CheckAndExpireSandboxesUseCase,
// │                        #   UpdateSnapshotLastAccessedUseCase
// └── presentation/
//     ├── SandboxViewModel.kt
//     ├── SandboxHomeUiState.kt
//     └── components/      # SnapshotSelectorPill, SnapshotSelectorSheet, SandboxTransactionItem,
//                          #   SandboxTransactionList, HeroProjectedSpend, ComparisonDeltaRow,
//                          #   AddSandboxTransactionSheet
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface SandboxSnapshot {
  id: Long;
  name: String;
  description: String?;
  createdAt: Long;
  lastAccessedAt: Long;
  initialSafeToSpend: Long;   // Real STS at snapshot creation time (cents)
}

interface SandboxTransaction {
  id: Long;
  snapshotId: Long;
  accountId: Long;
  amount: Long;               // Always positive (cents); type determines direction
  date: Long;
  type: TransactionType;      // INCOME | EXPENSE (no TRANSFER in sandbox)
  status: TransactionStatus;  // always PENDING for new sandbox transactions
  description: String?;
  category: String?;
  originalTransactionId: Long?; // set when promoted from real
  createdAt: Long;
  updatedAt: Long;
}

interface SandboxComparison {
  realSafeToSpend: Long;
  sandboxSafeToSpend: Long;
  difference: Long;           // sandboxSafeToSpend - realSafeToSpend (signed)
}

// Request model for adding a transaction to a sandbox
interface AddSandboxTransactionRequest {
  snapshotId: Long;
  accountId: Long;
  amount: Long;               // cents, must be > 0
  date: Long;
  type: TransactionType;      // INCOME or EXPENSE
  category: String;           // required
  description: String?;
}

// Home screen UI state — drives the sandbox content area
interface SandboxHomeUiState {
  isSandboxMode: Boolean;
  activeSnapshot: SandboxSnapshot?;
  availableSnapshots: List<SandboxSnapshot>;
  isSnapshotSheetVisible: Boolean;
  sandboxTransactions: List<SandboxTransaction>;   // live list for active snapshot
  projectedSafeToSpend: Long;                      // reactive: recalculates on every tx add/remove
  comparison: SandboxComparison?;                  // null when no active snapshot
  isAddTransactionSheetVisible: Boolean;
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Sandbox creates a point-in-time snapshot capturing the real STS value at creation
Constraint: Sandbox transactions are isolated — they never appear in real STS queries (is_sandbox = 0 guard)
Constraint: Both INCOME and EXPENSE transaction types are addable in sandbox; TRANSFER is not supported
Constraint: Multiple sandboxes can exist simultaneously
Constraint: Sandbox inherits real account list at creation (for account selector in Add Transaction sheet)
Constraint: initialSafeToSpend is set at snapshot creation and never changes afterwards
Constraint: Sandbox can be deleted without affecting real data; deletion cascades to sandbox_transactions
Constraint: Individual sandbox transactions can be promoted to real PENDING transactions
Constraint: Sandbox expires after 30 days of inactivity (last_accessed_at); expiry runs at app start only
Constraint: Sandbox name required, max 50 characters

// Projected STS formula
Constraint: projectedSafeToSpend = initialSafeToSpend + sum(INCOME sandbox tx amounts) - sum(EXPENSE sandbox tx amounts)
Constraint: projectedSafeToSpend is always shown, even when negative (red text + warning icon when < 0)
Constraint: projectedSafeToSpend updates reactively — no manual refresh required after every add/remove

// Comparison
Constraint: comparison.difference = sandboxSafeToSpend - realSafeToSpend (positive = sandbox is better, negative = sandbox is worse)
Constraint: comparison delta is shown inline on the sandbox home view, below the projected STS hero

// UI / navigation
Constraint: Segmented control labels are "Live Budget" (left) and "Sandbox" (right)
Constraint: When "Sandbox" is selected, the header title changes to "Sandbox" and the content area below the segmented control switches entirely to sandbox content
Constraint: Leaving sandbox mode (tapping "Live Budget") calls setSandboxMode(false) — does NOT clear sandbox data from DB
Constraint: Snapshot selector pill always shows the active snapshot name; tapping opens the bottom sheet
Constraint: The snapshot bottom sheet lists all snapshots ordered by last_accessed_at DESC with a "Create New" option at the bottom
Constraint: updateLastAccessed is called whenever a snapshot is loaded or a transaction is added/removed
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Home Toggle: Live Budget → Sandbox
User Taps "Sandbox" segment
  |> SandboxViewModel.setSandboxMode(true)
  |> CheckAndExpireSandboxesUseCase.execute()       // clean up stale sandboxes first
  |> GetSandboxesUseCase.execute()                  // Flow<List<SandboxSnapshot>>
  |> If snapshots exist: auto-select most recently accessed (highest last_accessed_at)
  |> selectSnapshot(autoSelectedId)
  |> Update SandboxHomeUiState: isSandboxMode = true, availableSnapshots, activeSnapshot

// Snapshot Selection Flow
User Taps Snapshot Pill → isSnapshotSheetVisible = true
User Selects Snapshot in Sheet
  |> SandboxViewModel.selectSnapshot(id)
  |> GetSandboxByIdUseCase.execute(id)
  |> UpdateSnapshotLastAccessedUseCase.execute(id)
  |> Start collecting GetSandboxTransactionsUseCase(id)   // Flow<List<SandboxTransaction>>
  |> Start collecting GetSandboxSafeToSpendUseCase(id)    // Flow<Long> — reactive
  |> Start collecting CompareSandboxWithRealityUseCase(id) // SandboxComparison
  |> Update: activeSnapshot, sandboxTransactions, projectedSafeToSpend, comparison
  |> isSnapshotSheetVisible = false

// Add Transaction Flow (persisted, triggers reactive STS update)
User Taps "Add Transaction" → isAddTransactionSheetVisible = true
User Fills form (category, amount, type, date, account) → taps "Add"
  |> Validate: category not blank, amount > 0
  |> AddSimulationTransactionUseCase.execute(AddSandboxTransactionRequest)
  |> SandboxRepository.insertSandboxTransaction(...)
  |> UpdateSnapshotLastAccessedUseCase.execute(snapshotId)
  |> DB write triggers Flow emission from getSandboxTransactionsBySnapshot
  |> GetSandboxSafeToSpendUseCase recomputes projectedSafeToSpend automatically
  |> CompareSandboxWithRealityUseCase recomputes comparison automatically
  |> SandboxHomeUiState updates: sandboxTransactions, projectedSafeToSpend, comparison
  |> isAddTransactionSheetVisible = false

// Remove Transaction Flow
User Long-presses / swipes sandbox transaction → confirm delete
  |> RemoveSimulationTransactionUseCase.execute(transactionId)
  |> SandboxRepository.deleteSandboxTransaction(transactionId)
  |> Same reactive update chain as Add Transaction

// Promote Transaction Flow
User Taps "Promote to Real" on a sandbox transaction item
  |> PromoteTransactionUseCase.execute(sandboxTransactionId)
  |> TransactionRepository.insertTransaction(realTransaction with status = PENDING)
  |> SandboxRepository.deleteSandboxTransaction(sandboxTransactionId)
  |> Reactive update: sandboxTransactions, projectedSafeToSpend, comparison

// Create Sandbox Flow
User Taps "Create New" in snapshot sheet → enters name → confirms
  |> CreateSandboxUseCase.execute(name, description, currentRealSafeToSpend)
  |> SandboxRepository.createSnapshot(name, desc, initialSafeToSpend = realSTS, now, now)
  |> GetSandboxesUseCase re-emits updated list
  |> Auto-select new snapshot
  |> isSnapshotSheetVisible = false

// Delete Sandbox Flow
User Long-presses sandbox in sheet → confirm delete
  |> DeleteSandboxUseCase.execute(snapshotId)
  |> SandboxRepository.deleteSnapshot(snapshotId)     // cascades to sandbox_transactions
  |> If deleted sandbox was active: clear activeSnapshot, sandboxTransactions, comparison
  |> GetSandboxesUseCase re-emits

// Leave Sandbox
User Taps "Live Budget" segment
  |> SandboxViewModel.setSandboxMode(false)
  |> Cancel active Flow collections for sandbox data
  |> Update: isSandboxMode = false
  |> DB state is preserved; no data cleared
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
fn CreateSandbox(ctx: Context, name: String, description: String?, initialSafeToSpend: Long): Result<SandboxSnapshot>
fn GetSandboxes(ctx: Context): Flow<List<SandboxSnapshot>>
fn GetSandboxById(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<SandboxSnapshot?>
fn GetSandboxTransactions(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Flow<List<SandboxTransaction>>
fn AddSimulationTransaction(ctx: Context, req: AddSandboxTransactionRequest): Result<SandboxTransaction>
fn RemoveSimulationTransaction(ctx: Context, transactionId: Long): Result<Unit>
fn GetSandboxSafeToSpend(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Flow<Long>
fn CompareSandboxWithReality(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Flow<SandboxComparison>
fn PromoteTransaction(ctx: Context, sandboxTransactionId: Long): Result<Transaction>
fn DeleteSandbox(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Result<Unit>
fn CheckAndExpireSandboxes(ctx: Context): Result<Int>
fn UpdateSnapshotLastAccessed(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Result<Unit>
```

---

## UI Components

```sudolang
// SandboxHomeContent — replaces home content area when isSandboxMode = true
// Rendered in order (top to bottom):
//   1. SnapshotSelectorPill
//   2. HeroProjectedSpend
//   3. ComparisonDeltaRow
//   4. SandboxTransactionList (with Add button)
interface SandboxHomeContentProps {
  state: SandboxHomeUiState;
  onSnapshotPillTap: () -> Unit;
  onAddTransaction: () -> Unit;
  onRemoveTransaction: (Long) -> Unit;
  onPromoteTransaction: (Long) -> Unit;
}

// SnapshotSelectorPill — full-width dark pill below segmented control
interface SnapshotSelectorPillProps {
  activeSnapshotName: String?;  // null → "No Snapshot Selected"
  onTap: () -> Unit;
}

// SnapshotSelectorSheet — ModalBottomSheet
interface SnapshotSelectorSheetProps {
  snapshots: List<SandboxSnapshot>;
  activeSnapshotId: Long?;      // shown with checkmark
  onSelect: (Long) -> Unit;
  onDelete: (Long) -> Unit;
  onCreateNew: () -> Unit;
  onDismiss: () -> Unit;
}

// HeroProjectedSpend — reuses Hero / Safe to Spend with different label
interface HeroProjectedSpendProps {
  projectedSafeToSpend: Long;   // red label + warning icon when < 0
  label: String;                // "PROJECTED SPEND"
}

// ComparisonDeltaRow — single row below the hero showing delta vs real
interface ComparisonDeltaRowProps {
  realSafeToSpend: Long;
  difference: Long;             // signed; green if positive, red if negative
}

// AddSandboxTransactionSheet — ModalBottomSheet for adding a transaction
interface AddSandboxTransactionSheetProps {
  accounts: List<Account>;
  onAdd: (AddSandboxTransactionRequest) -> Unit;
  onDismiss: () -> Unit;
}

// SandboxTransactionItem — row in the transaction list
interface SandboxTransactionItemProps {
  transaction: SandboxTransaction;
  onRemove: (Long) -> Unit;
  onPromote: (Long) -> Unit;
}

// Design system components used:
// mTtvR (Segmented Control) — "Live Budget" | "Sandbox" toggle
// 0yIOD (Hero / Safe to Spend) — reused as HeroProjectedSpend with label override
// Ks9uf (Transaction Item) — base for SandboxTransactionItem rows
// Bdc8O (Button / Primary Icon Leading) — "Add Transaction" button
// MO989 (Button / Ghost) — "Promote" action on sandbox transaction items
// Ifqk0 (Button / Destructive) — "Remove" action on sandbox transaction items
// CvyNk (Header) — title switches to "Sandbox" when isSandboxMode = true
// qE6i6 (Results List) — container for SandboxTransactionList
// TFM6d (Modal / Dialog) — delete confirmation for sandbox or transaction
```

---

## Database Schema

```sudolang
// sandbox_snapshots — add initial_safe_to_spend column (migration required if data exists)
table sandbox_snapshots {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  name: Text NOT NULL
  description: Text
  initial_safe_to_spend: Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0   // STS at snapshot creation (cents)
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  last_accessed_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

table sandbox_transactions {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  snapshot_id: Long NOT NULL REFERENCES sandbox_snapshots(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  account_id: Long NOT NULL
  amount: Integer NOT NULL          // always positive; type determines direction
  date: Integer NOT NULL
  type: Text NOT NULL               // 'income' | 'expense'
  status: Text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
  description: Text
  category: Text
  original_transaction_id: Long     // set when promoted from real transaction
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  updated_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

index idx_snapshots_last_accessed ON sandbox_snapshots(last_accessed_at)
index idx_sandbox_snapshot ON sandbox_transactions(snapshot_id)
index idx_sandbox_date ON sandbox_transactions(date)
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// getAllSnapshots :many — ordered by most recently accessed first
SELECT * FROM sandbox_snapshots ORDER BY last_accessed_at DESC;

// getSnapshotById :one
SELECT * FROM sandbox_snapshots WHERE id = :id;

// insertSnapshot :one
INSERT INTO sandbox_snapshots (name, description, initial_safe_to_spend, created_at, last_accessed_at)
VALUES (:name, :description, :initial_safe_to_spend, :created_at, :last_accessed_at)
RETURNING *;

// updateLastAccessed :exec
UPDATE sandbox_snapshots SET last_accessed_at = :last_accessed_at WHERE id = :id;

// deleteSnapshot :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_snapshots WHERE id = :id;

// getExpiredSnapshots :many
SELECT * FROM sandbox_snapshots WHERE last_accessed_at < :cutoff;

// getSandboxTransactionsBySnapshot :many  — reactive Flow query
SELECT * FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE snapshot_id = :snapshot_id ORDER BY date ASC;

// getSandboxBalanceDelta :one — used by GetSandboxSafeToSpendUseCase
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) -
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS delta
FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE snapshot_id = :snapshot_id;

// insertSandboxTransaction :one
INSERT INTO sandbox_transactions (snapshot_id, account_id, amount, date, type, status, description, category, original_transaction_id, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (:snapshot_id, :account_id, :amount, :date, :type, :status, :description, :category, :original_transaction_id, :created_at, :updated_at)
RETURNING *;

// deleteSandboxTransaction :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE id = :id;

// deleteSandboxTransactionsBySnapshot :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE snapshot_id = :snapshot_id;
```

---

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: sqldelight (2.0.1) - Database (reactive Flow queries)
Dependency: koin (3.5.3) - DI
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines (1.7.3) - Async, Flow collection
Dependency: kotlinx-datetime (0.5.0) - Date handling for expiry calculation

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: features/accounts - Account list for Add Transaction account selector
Dependency: features/transactions - PromoteTransaction inserts into real transactions table
Dependency: features/budget - Real STS value needed at snapshot creation and for comparison
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| No snapshots exist | User enters sandbox for first time | Show "No snapshots yet" empty state with "Create New" CTA |
| projectedSafeToSpend goes negative | Expenses exceed initialSafeToSpend | Show amount in colorError with warning icon; do not block adding more transactions |
| Real STS changes while sandbox active | New real transactions added/confirmed | comparison.realSafeToSpend updates reactively; show updated delta without interrupting user |
| Delete sandbox with transactions | sandbox_transactions not empty | Show confirm dialog before deletion; cascade handles DB cleanup |
| Promote transaction to real | sandboxTransactionId valid | Create real PENDING transaction, remove from sandbox, reactive update |
| Sandbox expiration | last_accessed_at older than 30 days at app start | Auto-delete silently; if it was the active snapshot, clear selection |
| Account deleted after snapshot created | account_id no longer in accounts table | Show transaction with "Unknown Account" label; promote still creates real tx with that account_id |
| Empty sandbox (no transactions added) | sandboxTransactions is empty | Show projectedSafeToSpend = initialSafeToSpend with empty state message and Add Transaction button prominent |
| Duplicate sandbox name | name already used | Allow — uniqueness not enforced, names are for user reference only |
